use_cases: Collect numerical ratings (1-10 scale) in customer feedback surveys
Enable NPS-style scoring for user satisfaction measurement
Provide product or service rating selection in e-commerce checkout flows
Gather employee or customer satisfaction scores in enterprise applications
Support survey-based data collection with visual rating indicators
ai_summary: A reusable rating scale group component built on Radix UI's RadioGroup primitive for selecting numerical ratings. Features clean minimalist styling with hover states, keyboard navigation support, and a distinctive green glow indicator dot for selected items. Ideal for survey forms, feedback collection, and satisfaction rating interfaces in SaaS, e-commerce, and healthcare applications.
